calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CLAUDIA J. LOWDER APPEARING FOR THE ADMINISTRATOR DAVID COOMBS;
ATTY. JOHN ASPELIN, APPEARING IN PRO PER; ATTY. LLOYD CRENA FOR BARBARA COOMBS(BENEFICIARY).

THE COURT GRANTED THE FINAL DISTRIBUTION SINCE THERE WERE NO OBJECTIONS. ATTY ASPELIN WITHDREW HIS OBJECTIONS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT TOOK THE REVISED ORDER FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE : JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN, CSR. 11722; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lloyd Crena for Barbara Thompson. John Aspelin in Pro Per. Claudia Lowder for Dave Coombs.

Mr. Aspelin stated that he filed an objection yesterday. Ms. Lowder requested a continuance to be able to reply to the objection. The matter was continued to December 11, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.
